title: The Ashdown Affair
hook: A businessman is found dead after a private dinner, and the police cannot reconcile the witness timelines.
police_summary: The responding team built a competent first-pass file: the victim died after a private dinner at the Ashdown Hotel, three people have obvious motive or opportunity, and the timeline still refuses to settle into one coherent account. You have been called in because every witness statement seems clean until it is read against the others.

initial_open_questions: Who last saw Adrian Vale alive?
Why does the dinner timeline not match the hotel ledger?
What prompted the victim to leave the dining room early?

archive_domains.label: Crime Scene Packet
archive_domains.summary: Incident reports, witness statements, and corridor observations from the night of the death.

archive_domains.label: Medical and Forensics
archive_domains.summary: Autopsy extracts, toxicology notes, and physiological inconsistencies.

archive_domains.label: Financial Records
archive_domains.summary: Hotel ledgers, cash notes, and private bookings that never made the official first pass.

archive_domains.label: Communications and Logs
archive_domains.summary: Call summaries, drafts, and recovered communications metadata.

location_dossiers.label: Ashdown Hotel
location_dossiers.summary: The hotel where the dinner took place, including the west corridor, banquet hall, and the quietly booked suite linked to the case.

location_dossiers.label: Service Corridor
location_dossiers.summary: A narrow, polished staff corridor where Vale collapsed after leaving the dining room.

location_dossiers.label: Harbor Office
location_dossiers.summary: A secondary office tied to the victim's private dealings, later connected through follow-up archive work.

valid_board_links.notes: The hotel ledger suggests a private suite booking tied to the victim.
Call traffic implies Mara was hiding a business crisis.

deduction_beats.title: Suite Booking Proven
deduction_beats.payoff: You proved the private suite was not routine hotel noise: the ledger ties Room 402, the Ashdown Suite alias, and Bell's initials to the same window as Vale's disappearance.
deduction_beats.objective: Use the confirmed suite booking to press Bell about Lena Orlov or rescan the Harbor Office lead.

deduction_beats.title: Lena Orlov Enters the Case
deduction_beats.payoff: Lena Orlov is no longer just a name in the margins. The witness account and suite lead put her near the hidden meeting, making her a live person of interest.
deduction_beats.objective: Bring Lena Orlov into interrogation and compare her story against the suite ledger.

deduction_beats.title: Harbor Office Pressure
deduction_beats.payoff: The Harbor Office is now a pressure point, not background flavor. It connects Mara's private contact with Vale to the unfinished follow-up memo.
deduction_beats.objective: Use the Harbor Office thread to pressure Mara about her calendar and the business fallout.

deduction_beats.title: Call Chain Recovered
deduction_beats.payoff: The recovered call log creates a clean chain: Lena called Vale, Vale called Mara, and Harbor Office reception tried to reach him before the collapse window.
deduction_beats.objective: Pin the call log and test whether Mara, Lena, or Bell has the weakest explanation for the timing.

deduction_beats.title: Sedative Pattern Confirmed
deduction_beats.payoff: The autopsy makes the death feel less like a sudden attack and more like a timed setup. The collapse window should be tested against every claimed location.
deduction_beats.objective: Pressure Ellis about the sedative question, then compare his answer against the timeline.

canonical_truth.motive_summary: Mara Voss killed Adrian Vale to stop him exposing the business crisis and dissolving their partnership.
canonical_truth.timeline_summary: Mara arranged contact around the Harbor Office, used Vale's sedative research to create cumulative exposure, spoke with him during the dinner window, and relied on the delayed collapse to protect her alibi.
motive_concepts: stop Adrian Vale from exposing Mara
timeline_concepts: Harbor Office contact before the dinner
Adrian Vale called Mara Voss at 09:13 PM
